milestoneTitle: Phase M9.19a.10 — Title full width on condensed tiles. User flagged course titles getting cut off (e.g. 'Claude 101') because the title was sharing its row with the top-right status quadrant (10m + START pills), leaving the title lane narrow. Two fixes bundled: (1) grid-template-areas revised so title now spans the full content+trailing width on its own row beneath the eyebrow+status row — no more horizontal competition; (2) summary retired from the condensed tile (renderLearnItemRow no longer emits .dash-tile-summary) since the full summary already reads in the expanded view on tap. This matches user's 'progressive disclosure' direction cleanly: condensed = title + status + flags/coverage/progress at a glance; expanded = eyebrow + title + full summary + link + CTA. Cascades across all three tile surfaces (Learn list, dashboard Learn panel, dashboard Projects panel) since they share grid-template-areas. buildLearnTileExpand reads summary directly from the source item so the expanded card still shows it.
